mapper.select: SELECT distinct m.perms FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_shop_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_role ro ON ur.role_id = ro.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND ro.status = 1 AND m.del_flag = 0 AND ro.del_flag = 0
